title: Anime Openings (Music)
description: Replaces The MC Menu Music And The MC Disc Music To a Piano Opening Song
body:
Introduction: This GUI-only resource pack is themed around "anime music" You can use it with other resource packs by placing it on top.

**Additional Resources:**
- Check out more content on [My Website](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/)
- Join our [Discord](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/) server to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions.
Thank you for your support! ❤️

###  **Code Snipped Of What Has Changed**
```
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_13.desc": "Iris Out"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_cat.desc": "JJK S2 OP2"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_5.desc": "OSHI NO KO"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_chirp.desc": "Boku no Hero Academia S2 OP1"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_far.desc": "Pokemon (GOTTA CATCH 'EM ALL)"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_mellohi.desc": "Naruto Opening 1"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_mall.desc": "Dragon Ball Opening"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_blocks.desc": "in the pool"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_creator.desc": "Tokyo Ghoul Opening"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_lava_chicken.desc": "No Game No Life op"
  "item.minecraft.music_disc_otherside.desc": "Call of the Night"
```

This Resource Pack Changes Audio
